title: Add dotted background pattern to global styles
Update Customer Stories list page styling
description:
Update src/pages/customer-stories/index.astro to match nuefunnel.com design:

1. Page title 'Customer Case Studies':
   - Black color (different from Blog which is cyan)
   - Centered, bold

2. Article list items:
   - Same horizontal layout as Blog: thumbnail left, text right
   - Thumbnail: 180px width, rounded corners (8px)
   - Title: Black, bold
   - Date: Gray (#6B658C)
   - Clean, minimal styling

File: src/pages/customer-stories/index.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 6

title: Add gradient text utility class for headings
Update Blog post article page typography
description:
Update src/pages/blog/[slug].astro to match nuefunnel.com article styling:

1. Article header:
   - Title: Black, bold, centered, ~32-40px
   - Date: Gray, centered, below title
   - Featured image: Full content width, rounded corners

2. Article content typography:
   - Max width: 720px, centered
   - Body text: 18px, gray (#555), 1.8 line-height
   - Section headers (h2): 24px, bold, black
   - Links: Cyan (#00A0E4), no underline until hover
   - Bold text: Slightly darker gray
   - Proper spacing between paragraphs (24px)

3. Embedded media:
   - Videos: Rounded corners, centered

File: src/pages/blog/[slug].astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 7

title: Update Blog list page styling
description:
Update src/pages/blog/index.astro to match nuefunnel.com design:

1. Page title 'Blog posts':
   - Cyan/blue color (#00A0E4)
   - Centered

2. Article list items:
   - Horizontal layout: thumbnail left, text right
   - Thumbnail: 180px width, rounded corners (8px)
   - Title: Black, bold, 18px
   - Date: Gray (#6B658C), below title
   - Remove card shadows and heavy styling
   - Simpler, cleaner look

3. Remove description preview (original site only shows title + date)

File: src/pages/blog/index.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 6

title: Update Homepage feature cards styling
description:
Update the feature cards section on index.astro:

1. Card background:
   - Light lavender/purple gradient: rgba(229, 221, 255, 0.2) to rgba(229, 221, 255, 0.4)
   - Remove white background and heavy shadows

2. Card styling:
   - Border radius: 12px
   - Padding: 30px
   - Center-aligned content

3. Icons:
   - Muted purple color (#6B658C)

4. Section tagline:
   - Add italic purple gradient text above cards
   - 'Enhance user experience, reduce support overhead...'

5. Grid layout: Keep 2x2 with centered 5th card

File: src/pages/index.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 5

title: Update Homepage CTA section styling
description:
Update the bottom CTA section on index.astro:

1. Remove gradient background (currently from-primary/10 to-primary/5)
2. Use transparent background (let dotted pattern show through)
3. CTA heading: Could use gradient text or keep black
4. 'Sign up today.' style heading with purple gradient
5. Button: Muted purple (#6B658C)

File: src/pages/index.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 5

title: Update Tailwind config with new color palette and fonts
description:
Add the new nuefunnel.com color palette to tailwind.config.mjs:
- Primary purple: #580DD9 (gradient start)
- Primary magenta: #8E2DA6 (gradient end)
- Accent cyan: #00A0E4 (links, logo on inner pages)
- Muted purple: #6B658C (buttons, body text)

Add Bungee font family for the logo.

Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md sections 1 and 2

title: Update Header component with new design language
description:
Update the Header.astro component to match nuefunnel.com design:

1. Logo styling:
   - Use Bungee font
   - Uppercase text
   - Black on homepage, cyan (#00A0E4) on inner pages
   
2. Navigation links:
   - Cyan/blue color
   - Active state: underlined (not color change)
   - Remove current border-bottom styling

3. CTA button:
   - Update to muted purple (#6B658C) background

File: src/components/Header.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 4

title: Update Footer component styling
description:
Update the Footer.astro component to match nuefunnel.com design:

1. Layout: Flex with space-between (copyright left, links right)
2. Copyright text: Gray color, 14px
3. Social links: Cyan/blue color (#00A0E4)
4. Minimal design with proper spacing

File: src/components/Footer.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 8

title: Update Homepage hero section with gradient heading
description:
Update the hero section on index.astro:

1. Hero heading:
   - Apply gradient-text class for purple-magenta gradient
   - Keep 72px size on desktop

2. Subheading:
   - Gray color (#6B658C)
   - Centered

3. CTA button:
   - Muted purple background (#6B658C)
   - Update btn-primary class or inline styles

4. Remove any solid background sections (use dotted pattern everywhere)

File: src/pages/index.astro
Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 5

title: Update Customer Story article page typography
description:
Update src/pages/customer-stories/[slug].astro with same typography as blog posts:

1. Article header:
   - Title: Black, bold, centered
   - Date: Gray, centered
   - Company/Industry info styling
   - Featured image: Rounded corners

2. Article content:
   - Same typography as blog posts
   - Max width 720px, centered
   - Gray body text, black headers
   - Cyan links

Reference: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section 7

title: Add floating navbar effect with shadow
description:
Add box-shadow to the navbar to create the 'floating' visual effect seen on nuefunnel.com.

Current: border-b border-gray-200 (dividing line)
Target: box-shadow for floating effect

CSS from original site:
```css
box-shadow: rgba(136, 136, 136, 0.25) 5px 5px 2px 0px;
```

Or use Tailwind shadow-md class as approximation.

File: src/components/Header.astro
This is a styling change only - no structural changes needed.
